x-enumeration-literals.name: Place Of Settlement
x-enumeration-literals.description: Place where settlement of securities occurs.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Receiving Settlement Party
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party that receives securities as part of a chain of settlement parties or as ultimate party.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Local Settlement Agent Role
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party which holds securities and settles trades for non-resident customers. The customers' securities are held in one omnibus account or in sub accounts at the local central securities depository.(ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Delivering Settlement Party
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party that is responsible for delivering securities as part of a chain of settlement parties or as party that sells them.(ISO20022)
